---
title: Amplifier
author: Various Artists
format: html
image: https://amplifier.org/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/IMG_3521-1.jpg
image-alt: A wall of posters
---

Amplifier is a nonprofit design lab that builds art and media experiments to amplify movements. 

<https://amplifier.org/campaigns/>


![](https://amplifier.org/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/IMG_3521-1.jpg "A wall of posters")
